name: axis_pipeline_fifo
core_function: AXI-stream pipeline FIFO/register slice for timing closure with a small number of ready/valid stages.
algorithm: Favor this skill when the query mentions timing closure, pipeline FIFO, register slice, or added latency.
structure: Build a chain of ready/valid storage stages.
A stage can accept when it is empty or the next stage accepts.
Backpressure ripples upstream through stage-ready signals.
Data advances one stage per clock when downstream is ready.
